meanings.definition: become part of; become a member of a group or organization
examples: He joined the Communist Party as a young man

meanings.definition: cause to become joined or linked
examples: join these two parts so that they fit together
She joined him for a drink

meanings.definition: be or become joined or united or linked
examples: The two streets connect to become a highway
The travelers linked up again at the airport

meanings.definition: of or relating to two people who are married to each other
connected by a link, as railway cars or trailer trucks
